title: deschampsia submutica
intro: Deschampsia submutica, also known as lesser tussock grass, is a species of grass within the genus Deschampsia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Deschampsia submutica include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized.
